channel.title: Chart Breakers & Star Stories
channel.itunes:author: Family TVR
channel.itunes:summary: Did your favorite artist just break a record or a heart? The charts are screaming, and we have the inside story you won't hear anywhere else.
channel.description: The latest music trends, chart updates, and star stories from Billboard and beyond. Stay updated with the Pop Culture.

item.title: Pacha New York Announces Opening Weekend Date & Lineup: See Who’s Playing
item.description:
[Intro music plays]
Host: "Welcome to Trending on Billboard. We've got some exciting news for all you dance music fans out there. The wait is finally over - Pacha New York has revealed its opening weekend lineup, and it's a big one."
[Short music transition]
Host: "Mark your calendars for June 20th and 21st, when English star Michael Bibi and South African legend Black Coffee take the stage. This is Bibi's only US date outside of Chicago's ARC Music Festival in September, and for Black Coffee, it's his only US date this summer."
[Short music transition]
Host: "But that's not all - this new beginning for the venue comes after a bit of a rocky past. You may remember that it was previously the Brooklyn Mirage, which faced permitting issues and bankruptcy. But with new management in place, Pacha operators are looking to make things right with the community. In fact, they're offering coupons to the tune of $3 million to fans who held unrefunded tickets and season passes from canceled Brooklyn Mirage shows."
[Short music transition]
Host: "The email to fans reads, 'Before we look ahead, we want to speak directly to you, the community that has always been at the heartbeat of New York's dance culture.' They're offering 100% of the original ticket value as a coupon at Pacha New York. That's a big gesture, and we can't wait to see what the future holds for this iconic venue."
[Outro music plays]
Host: "That's all for today, folks. Get ready to dance the night away at Pacha New York. We'll be keeping an eye on this one - stay tuned for more updates."
